svg.title: SpatialGen-Bench V2 overview
svg.desc: SpatialGen-Bench V2 contains 470 samples across 14 spatial tasks and four capability levels: perception, understanding, reasoning, and interaction.

g.text: A diagnostic benchmark for generative spatial cognition
Four capability levels / metric-compatible task semantics

g.title: Counting: 40 samples, Count output, Exact match metric
Depth: 30 samples, A/B choice output, Accuracy metric
Orientation: 40 samples, Direction output, Accuracy metric
Object Size: 35 samples, Choice output, Accuracy metric
Relationship: 35 samples, Boolean output, Accuracy metric
Perspective: 35 samples, Choice output, Accuracy metric
Mental Modeling: 35 samples, Choice output, Accuracy metric
Spatial Grounding: 35 samples, Point output, Point-in-mask metric
Prediction: 25 samples, Slot output, Partial score metric
Multi-hop: 30 samples, Choice output, Accuracy metric
Geometric Feasibility: 35 samples, Choice output, Accuracy metric
Affordance: 35 samples, Region output, Precision metric
Navigation: 30 samples, State output, Accuracy metric
Trajectory: 30 samples, Path output, DFD metric
